response.overview: “LOVE IS LOVE” Love is a familiar phase but in this film, I wanted to approach its meaning from a slightly different perspective. Love is not confined to any fixed form or standard. It has no limits and no boundaries. Ultimately, love is a feeling that exists in and of itself, something that naturally reveals itself through the way each person comes to recognize who they are. There is no need to force yourself to fit into any predefined expectations. Simply being who you are, loving yourself, and allowing yourself to be happy—that alone is enough.
response.title: LOVE IS LOVE, 2026
